variants: Goran Mijic is a noted Zealous Harmony Composer whose innovative works have been published by Hollow Finch Editions. Throughout his academic career, he received guidance from his mentor, Marcel Schweighofer, who played a significant role in his development as a composer. His projects have often been supported by the primary funding source, the Nimbus Forge Foundation. In addition to his professional pursuits, Goran also serves as the Outlands Safety Walk Team Lead, contributing to community welfare through civic engagement.

Goran also dedicates his time to volunteer work as the Outlands Safety Walk Team Lead, demonstrating his commitment to community service.
